Name: Avenues: The World School
Tagline: Avenues is a toddler–grade 12 private school providing transformative, world-focused learning experiences to students around the globe.
About: We will graduate students who are accomplished in the academic skills one would expect; at ease beyond their borders; truly fluent in a second language; good writers and speakers one and all; confident because they excel in a particular passion; artists no matter their field; practical in the ways of the world; emotionally unafraid and physically fit; humble about their gifts and generous of spirit; trustworthy; aware that their behavior makes a difference in our ecosystem; great leaders when they can be, good followers when they should be; on their way to well-chosen higher education; and, most importantly, architects of lives that transcend the ordinary. We will share our prosperity with those who need it, initially through traditional financial aid and, as we grow, in more innovative and broader-scale ways that leap the walls of our campuses.
Philosophy: Avenues: The World School emphasizes a global curriculum that fosters bilingual proficiency and interdisciplinary learning. The school encourages students to engage with real-world challenges, promoting critical thinking and creativity through project-based learning and personalized education paths.
Outcomes: Colleges look for more than strong academics—they want to see students who engage deeply with the subjects and issues that inspire them, and who show clear potential to thrive in the next chapter of their learning. At Avenues, we design the college counseling process with that in mind.
Admissions: Our admissions team and campus community look forward to getting to know your family through the application process. In turn, we look forward to introducing you to our world-centered education in the West Chelsea neighborhood of Manhattan.
Quote: The cornerstones of the music program are rhythm, student choice and abundant performance opportunities. We strive to learn through doing and playing, and seek to create community—both within the school and within the neighborhood.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Exceptional faculty united around a common mission. A unique curriculum brought to life by transformative world-focused learning experiences.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Avenues serves students from early childhood to 18 years old through our two campuses in New York and São Paulo, which are Interconnected and interdependent, just like the world.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Spanning grades 1–10, Avenues Wellness and Movement (WAM) is a unique health and physical education experience rooted in positive psychology and dynamic play. WAM focuses on social-emotional wellbeing and physical literacy through a comprehensive movement-based curriculum.
Performance.Academic Integration: Avenues: The World School offers a robust curriculum featuring AP courses in calculus and biology, alongside signature electives like Global Sustainability and Design Thinking, fostering interdisciplinary learning and bilingual proficiency.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Avenues: The World School have been accepted into Ivy League institutions at a rate of 20%, with notable alumni excelling in fields such as technology entrepreneurship and international diplomacy.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Avenues: The World School maintains quality through NYSAIS accreditation, utilizing ERB assessments and trimester reports to track progress, complemented by regular parent-teacher conferences for personalized feedback.
